## Validation

## Public Repository Safety

- [ ] I did not add secrets, tokens, credentials, raw logs, raw transcripts, browser/session state, database dumps, private endpoints, hostnames, usernames, or absolute local paths.
- [ ] Fixtures and examples are synthetic or explicitly redacted.
- [ ] Public docs do not rely on private operator-only deployment details.
- [ ] I ran the narrowest meaningful tests or documented why they do not apply.
